## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Ashley M. for the Engagement Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Ashley M. has 10 years of SEO experience, specializing in building functions from scratch for startups (e.g., Teachable), which aligns with growthx.ai's need for a proactive partner.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Client Management:** Ashley M. builds trust with "pushy" clients via proactive updates and handles out-of-scope requests by framing them as valuable additions, then scoping them for a contract add-on.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Growthx.ai's Model:** The company uses an 8-week "Strategy Sprint" to prove value, with a mutual opt-out at the end. Success is measured by early signals (indexing, impressions) before full SEO traction.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Company Challenge:** The primary challenge is scaling the Strategy Sprints into a repeatable system while maintaining an 85% client conversion rate and increasing weekly kickoffs from 2 to 3 by April.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

## Topics

### Growthx.ai's Strategy Sprints Model

  - [**Purpose:** An 8-week accelerated program to prove value and secure a long-term client partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Weeks 1–3 (Foundation):** Build deep client knowledge via artifacts (product docs, personas) to inform workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Weeks 4–8 (Execution):** Calibrate voice/tone, create writing guidelines, and publish content to hit a \~15-article-per-week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** Secure a "hell yes" from the client, who has a mutual opt-out option at the end.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Reporting Focus:** Emphasize early signals (indexing, impressions, clicks) to show progress before full SEO traction develops.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Candidate Experience & Approach

  - [**Background:** 10 years in SEO (agency, in-house, consulting), specializing in building functions from scratch for startups.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Teachable Case Study:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Problem:** \>80% of organic traffic was branded, missing new users.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**Solution:** A 6-month plan to target top-of-funnel, non-branded keywords with the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Result:** Significant organic traffic growth that also boosted service pages and the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**AI Philosophy:** Uses AI as a support tool (e.g., for keyword generation) but believes human oversight is essential to avoid generic, "obviously AI-generated" content.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Client Management & Reporting

  - [**Handling "Pushy" Clients:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Build trust early by acting as a proactive partner, not a supplier.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Tactics:** Provide frequent updates and highlight small wins to build positive momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**Handling Out-of-Scope Requests:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Process:** Acknowledge the request's validity → frame it as a valuable addition → scope it for a contract add-on.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Example:** A client's daily requests for extra content were converted into a paid quarterly hours package.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Reporting Philosophy:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Core Metrics:** Traffic, impressions, clicks, CTR, position changes.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Business Impact:** Tailor reports to client goals, showing how SEO drives leads, conversions, and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Growthx.ai's Challenges & Culture

  - [**Primary Challenge:** Scaling the Strategy Sprints into a repeatable system.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Hiring:** Finding high-quality Engagement Managers ("the quarterback").](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Enablement:** Systematizing training to transfer expert knowledge (e.g., from Marcel).](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Improving workflows and automation to reduce manual work.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [**Culture:**](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [**Proactivity:** Initiative and new ideas are highly rewarded.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** Open to feedback and incremental improvement; no ego-driven "one best solution."](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George Haikal:** Follow up with Ashley M. via email.](https://fathom.video/share/1rL7rJunvA3aSx3wjbv6YR-GAHdq2J91?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
